modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mind-your: Colors the entity hurt overlay based on damage type.
mind-your-bruises.config.title: Mind Your Bruises
mind-your-bruises.config.category.advanc: Add custom overrides for individual damage type ids.
mind-your-bruises.config.group.colors.de: These fixed groups keep the visual language simple while still allowing custom colors.
When disabled, entities use the vanilla red hurt overlay.
mind-your-bruises.config.option.damage_t: This list only shows custom overrides. Built-in mappings are applied automatically and are not listed here. Use one mapping per line: left side = damage type id, right side = color group, for example minecraft:drown=fallback. Valid groups: %s.
mind-your-bruises.config.color.fire.desc: Fire, lava, hot floor, fireballs, explosions, and fireworks.
mind-your-bruises.config.color.plant.des: Cactus and sweet berry bush damage.
mind-your-bruises.config.color.arcane.de: Magic, indirect magic, dragon breath, sonic boom, thorns, wither, void, outside border, and generic kill.
Unmatched damage, vanilla physical damage, bee stings, suffocation, cramming, and other fallback cases.
